headline: Federal Council grants infrastructure concession for Lausanne m3 metro
summary: Swiss Federal Council approves the infrastructure concession for the fully underground Lausanne m3 metro line, ~CHF 1.3bn mostly borne by Vaud.

headline: Parliament approves 0.4-point VAT rise to part-fund 13th AVS pension
summary: Swiss parliament votes a 0.4-point VAT increase as partial financing for the 13th AVS pension; goes to a popular vote.

headline: Swiss army pivots to drones and fewer top brass
summary: Defence minister Martin Pfister sets new strategic guidelines cutting command structure and emphasizing drones and hybrid warfare.

headline: Bern aligns Ukrainian-refugee status S with Brussels
summary: Federal Council weighs extending protection status S beyond March 2027, mirroring the EU, with a restriction for combat-age men.

headline: Federal 'Verkehr 45' plan maps rail and road expansion to 2045
summary: Swiss federal government unveils dozens of rail and road expansion projects under a Verkehr 45 plan running to 2045.

headline: Trump defends US-Iran MoU as Vance delays Switzerland talks
summary: Trump touts the signed US-Iran memorandum ending the US-Israeli war on Iran as Vance cancels the Switzerland negotiation trip.

headline: Israel keeps striking Lebanon after ceasefire, 47 killed
summary: At least 47 killed in Israeli attacks on Lebanon despite a Qatar/US/Iran-brokered ceasefire taking effect at 4pm local.

headline: Meloni-Trump row halts Italian diplomat's US trip
summary: Italy's foreign minister cancels a US trip after Meloni accuses Trump of fabricating a G7 photo-request story.

headline: Andy Burnham wins Makerfield by-election, eyes Starmer challenge
summary: Manchester mayor Andy Burnham wins a Commons seat at the Makerfield by-election, positioning to challenge PM Starmer.

headline: Ukrainian drone strikes bring 'oil rain' and fuel rationing to Russia
summary: Months of Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil infrastructure cause fuel rationing and oil fallout near Moscow as Kyiv lands EUR4bn in aid.

headline: JetBrains Hub authentication-bypass cluster, CVSS up to 10.0
summary: JetBrains Hub patches an auth bypass via direct DB access (CVE-2026-50242, 10.0) plus privesc and account-takeover flaws.

headline: pgAdmin 4 AI Assistant SQL injection and missing-auth deserialization RCE
summary: pgAdmin 4 fixes an AI Assistant indirect-prompt-injection SQL flaw (CVE-2026-12045) and a missing-auth pickle deserialization route (CVE-2026-12046).

headline: Rancher Manager import endpoint command injection, CVSS 9.4
summary: Rancher Manager before 2.14.2 has a command-injection flaw in the cluster import endpoint enabling container breakout (CVE-2026-44939).

headline: CISA ICS advisory: AVer cameras unauth RCE; NI grpc-device default creds
summary: CISA flags AVer PTC camera unauth RCE (CVE-2026-40624) and NI grpc-device default-credential exposure (CVE-2026-9142).

headline: LLM-as-a-Judge: reliability without validity across 21 judges
summary: Large-scale audit of 21 LLM judges finds exact-match agreement overstates ability; severe position bias coexists with high reliability.
affiliations: >0.10 — they favour whichever answer is shown first

headline: VIMPO: critic-free value-implicit policy optimization for LLMs
summary: VIMPO derives a policy-implied value function from KL-regularized RL optimality conditions, giving dense credit assignment without a learned critic.

headline: ADaPT: token-level decoupling of efficiency and correctness in reasoning models
summary: ADaPT uses a mode-selection token to apply efficiency rewards without penalizing long-but-correct chains of thought.

headline: QK Product Steering: training-free VLM hallucination mitigation by weight edit
summary: A data-free weight edit suppresses dominant singular modes in the query-key product to cut VLM object hallucination at zero inference cost.
affiliations: a memory-saving scheme where several query heads share one key/value head

headline: HydraHead: head-level attention hybridization of full and linear attention
summary: HydraHead fuses full and linear attention at the head granularity, motivated by interpretability showing head-level functional specialization.

headline: How transparent is DiffusionGemma? Decomposing diffusion-LM transparency
summary: Study decomposes diffusion language-model reasoning transparency into variable and algorithmic components versus autoregressive Gemma.
affiliations: Continues the diffusion-LM line from this week's Diffusion-Proof work — a *distinct* paper on a different question.
